---
name: Bug report
about: Report an issue with a skill file or repository tooling
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

Clear and concise description of the issue.

## Location

<!-- Link or path to the affected skill file or tool -->

## Current behavior

What is wrong or misleading?

## Expected behavior

What should it say or do instead?

## Severity

- [ ] Factual error — incorrect technical claim
- [ ] Missing information — important detail omitted
- [ ] Formatting / broken link
- [ ] Tooling issue — CLI, validation, build fails

## Additional context

Relevant references, documentation, or examples that support the correction.
